vehicle.name: I4A Raptor-VII
vehicle.subtitle: Seventh-generation fixed-wing autonomous aircraft. Carbon fiber composite airframe, ArduPilot guidance, and a precision ODLC imaging payload system.
vehicle.previewDesc: Our seventh-generation competition aircraft is our most capable platform yet. Built from carbon fiber composite with an 185 cm wingspan, the Raptor-VII carries a custom ODLC payload and can execute fully autonomous missions with sub-metre waypoint accuracy.

performanceInfo.label: Flight Performance
performanceInfo.title:
Built to Fly
Long and Precise
performanceInfo.desc: Every design decision on the Raptor-VII was optimized for the SUAS mission profile — extended loiter time, precise waypoint tracking, and stable imaging during ODLC passes.

subsystems.title: Airframe & Structure
subsystems.desc: The Raptor-VII fuselage is built from a 3-layer carbon fiber/Kevlar monocoque construction, hand-laid over a CNC-machined foam male mold. The wing uses a modified NACA 4415 airfoil profile optimized in XFLR5 for the aircraft's operating Reynolds number range. Quick-release wing attachment uses dual 8mm carbon tubes with machined aluminum couplers and positive-locking pins.

subsystems.title: Propulsion System
subsystems.desc: The pusher motor configuration keeps the nose clear for unobstructed forward camera views during ODLC passes. The T-Motor MN505-S delivers 68 N static thrust on a 6S dual-battery system. A folding propeller minimizes drag during glide phases, improving endurance by approximately 14% versus a fixed prop in wind-tunnel-correlated CFD analysis.

subsystems.title: Avionics & Autopilot
subsystems.desc: The Cube Orange+ flight controller runs ArduPilot Plane 4.4.4 with custom EKF3 tuning for the Raptor-VII's flight dynamics. Here3+ RTK GPS provides centimetre-level position accuracy when paired with our portable base station. All parameters are version-controlled in a Git repository and loaded via a validated configuration script before every flight.

subsystems.title: ODLC Imaging System
subsystems.desc: A Sony IMX477 12MP sensor captures 4032×3024 images at 4 fps during ODLC passes. The Jetson Orin Nano runs a YOLOv8-based detection pipeline that classifies shape, letter, colour, and background colour in under 80 ms per image. Geolocation computes target GPS coordinates from the camera's pixel position using RTK-corrected aircraft position and gimbal angle data.

subsystems.title: Payload Delivery
subsystems.desc: The payload bay accommodates a single 0.5 kg standardized bottle. A servo-driven release mechanism with redundant mechanical failsafe drops the payload at the computed release point, accounting for aircraft speed, altitude, and wind. A custom ballistic trajectory model achieves 2.5 m CEP at 40 m AGL in winds up to 8 m/s.

subsystems.title: Power System
subsystems.desc: A custom power distribution board (KiCad-designed, JLCPCB-fabricated) manages dual 6S LiPo inputs with bus arbitration, overcurrent protection, and per-rail voltage/current monitoring. A 12 V regulated rail powers avionics; a 5 V rail powers compute and cameras. All battery cells are logged to 10 Hz in ArduPilot telemetry for post-flight health analysis.
